response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that maps cleanly onto the role's AI agent development requirement. Stack alignment is strong on TS/Node/React/MongoDB plus Docker/Kubernetes and Java, with gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and PostgreSQL that are easily bridgeable given demonstrated polyglot adaptability and TDD/craftsmanship background.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack across TS/Node/React with current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, open-source projects
Polyglot across TS, Java, DLang, C/C++, Python-adjacent — fits 'right tool for the job' philosophy
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (likely Jest/other test frameworks used historically)
PostgreSQL not mentioned — database experience skews to MongoDB and MySQL
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less recent depth in the primary TS/Node ecosystem versus stack specialists
